<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep it to one concern per PR. -->

## What this changes

## Type
- [ ] New AI tell (added pattern + example + fix)
- [ ] Better fix / example
- [ ] Prompt / rule change
- [ ] Install / docs
- [ ] Other

## Checklist
- [ ] One concern, clear title
- [ ] Rule files in sync (SKILL.md / assets/checklist.md / PROMPT.md) if a rule changed
- [ ] No banned words introduced in the docs
- [ ] Tested on at least one model (which: ______)
